components.text:
Keeps herbs separate from everything else. Opens on use and holds twenty-seven slots — more than enough unless one is collecting obsessively.
The Spiritual Stone in the lining seems to slow whatever degradation process affects herbs in ordinary storage.

Crafted from leather, string, a Spiritual Stone, and any herb. The herb used in the pattern does not matter — it sets the affinity of the stitching, but I have found no practical difference between them.
I carry one at all times now.
